item.title: This is very much sub(?)tweeting everyone that commented on my previous video about Mamdani, I know why he tempers his rhetoric ...
item.description:
This is very much sub(?)tweeting everyone that commented on my previous video about Mamdani, I know why he tempers his rhetoric that is a critique of the system that forces him to do so I know why he is complicit with criminals like Obama that is a critique of the system that forces him to be.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: As I said, the question is rhetorical, we know why and that should be the focus of how to pressure and create such action
item.description:
As I said, the question is rhetorical, we know why and that should be the focus of how to pressure and create such action. Not the debate over the proper interpretation of imperial law, or even whether he fell back on his campaign promise almost everyone knew he would. This move movement is limited, if not justificatory for the empire at times, we must recognise that and move within it



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Washington Post, you are both racist and bad faith
item.description:
Washington Post, you are both racist and bad faith. It is embarrassing to post this without even recognising that the real concerns that are born out of the use of this technology that is literally enabling people to be snatched off of our street are in fact real.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: You aren’t a charity case
item.description:
You aren’t a charity case. The war crimes you commit are the things people actually fund charities to help address.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: You cannot possibly be suprised lizzy
item.description:
You cannot possibly be suprised lizzy. When u work with n*zis … they act like it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
